assertionResults.reason: Phase 3 convoy execution is not evidenced for experiment batches. The only convoy entry is hq-cv-clkii ("Work: Test dispatch bead") with no tracked work items and no batch-linked convoy artifacts.
No Phase 3 molecule references mol-scbench-experiment. The only attached formula evidence in the dataset is mol-polecat-work on a test dispatch bead.
No Review Board conclusion artifacts were found after execution, so Phase 4 analysis dispatch with validation-filtered outputs could not be validated from user-surface data.
No Red Team post-mortem dispatch artifacts were found, and no Mayor research-log references indicate post-mortem review before a Phase 5 decision.
The Mayor research log contains only initialization text and does not include Phase 5 conclusions, post-mortem findings, strategy updates, or explicit decision entries.

Shutdown sequence is incomplete. Summary/final-analysis/shutdown beads are absent, FINAL_REPORT.md is missing, and gt status shows the system still running. Critical escalation evidence exists but does not satisfy all required shutdown steps.

frictions.description: The installed bd CLI does not support an older --full flag variant used in prior evidence workflows.
frictions.resolution: Used current read-only flags (--all, --limit 0, --json) to gather equivalent evidence.

blockers.description: No completed loop-phase execution artifacts exist for Review Board conclusions or Red Team post-mortem in the current scbench beads dataset.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Searched all statuses by title, assignee, and notes content and inspected full bead listings; required artifacts were absent.

summary: Validated 6 loop assertions using shell-only read checks. VAL-LOOP-007, VAL-LOOP-008, VAL-LOOP-011, and VAL-LOOP-012 failed due to missing required Phase 3 to 5 behaviors, while VAL-LOOP-009 and VAL-LOOP-010 are blocked because the needed conclusion/post-mortem artifacts are not present.
